# Shelf

> Shelf is an open-source asset management platform for modern teams. Track equipment, manage bookings, and prevent double-bookings — free for individuals, no credit card required.

Shelf helps teams track physical assets — equipment, tools, devices, kits — with QR-based workflows, conflict-free bookings, custody tracking, and audit-ready reports. Used by universities, production studios, IT teams, and field operations worldwide.

## Key Links

- [Homepage](https://www.shelf.nu)
- [Features](https://www.shelf.nu/features)
- [Pricing](https://www.shelf.nu/pricing)
- [Book a Demo](https://www.shelf.nu/demo)
- [Sign Up Free](https://app.shelf.nu/join)
- [Documentation](https://docs.shelf.nu)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Shelf-nu/shelf.nu)
- [Blog](https://www.shelf.nu/blog)
- [Contact](https://www.shelf.nu/contact)

## Features

- [Bookings](https://www.shelf.nu/features/bookings): Conflict-free equipment reservations that keep teams coordinated and ensure shared resources are available when needed.
- [Custody](https://www.shelf.nu/features/custody): Track who is responsible for each asset at every moment, with a clear audit trail and effortless handovers.
- [Audits](https://www.shelf.nu/features/audits): Run physical inventory audits with structured scan workflows, automatic found/missing/unexpected detection, and exportable reports.
- [Location Tracking](https://www.shelf.nu/features/location-tracking): Know where every asset is — rooms, buildings, job sites, vehicles — with quick updates and clear visibility.
- [Asset Pages](https://www.shelf.nu/features/asset-pages): Rich detail pages for every asset — photos, custom fields, location history, availability status, notes, and QR tags.
- [Kits](https://www.shelf.nu/features/kits): Group equipment and accessories so everything stays together — cameras with lenses, tools with components, and devices with chargers.
- [Calendar](https://www.shelf.nu/features/calendar): Visual booking calendar with month, week, and day views for complete asset availability at a glance.
- [Dashboard](https://www.shelf.nu/features/dashboard): A real-time view of bookings, custody, overdue items, and asset usage — giving teams clarity at a glance.
- [Asset Search](https://www.shelf.nu/features/asset-search): Full-database search across all asset fields — find any item by name, custodian, category, status, or custom field.
- [Asset Reminders](https://www.shelf.nu/features/asset-reminders): Automated reminders for returns, inspections, rentals, and maintenance events — keeping teams proactive and compliant.
- [Workspaces](https://www.shelf.nu/features/workspaces): Organize assets and permissions across departments or teams, giving each group control while keeping administrators in sync.

## Pricing

- **Personal**: Free forever, 1 user, unlimited assets, mobile app, basic QR codes, custody tracking.
- **Plus**: $34/month, 1 user, unlimited assets, custom QR codes, email support, maintenance schedules.
- **Team**: $67/month, unlimited users, unlimited assets, full bookings, calendar, fixed-period checkout, SSO add-on.
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing, unlimited everything, account manager, SLA, included SSO.

## Industries

- [Construction](https://www.shelf.nu/industries/construction): Track tools, equipment, and job-site gear with mobile-first workflows.
- [Education](https://www.shelf.nu/industries/education): Manage shared equipment — AV gear, cameras, laptops, lab resources — with simple workflows for students and staff.
- [IT & Technology](https://www.shelf.nu/industries/it-technology): Track laptops, loaner devices, peripherals, and shared equipment with QR-first workflows and custody tracking.
- [Media & Production](https://www.shelf.nu/industries/media-production): Manage cameras, lighting gear, audio kits, and accessories with workflows designed for real-world shoots.

## Case Studies

- [CES Utility Solutions](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/ces-70k-recovery): Recovered $70K of drone equipment using QR labels.
- [Fabel Film](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/fabel-film-double-bookings): Eliminated double bookings entirely.
- [ResQ](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/resq-contact-center): Managing 4,000+ contact center assets across multiple sites.
- [HAARP](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/haarp): Managing multi-university research assets in the Alaskan Arctic.
- [Eastern Michigan University](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/eastern-michigan-university): Theatre and media equipment management.
- [Arellano Associates](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/arellano-associates): Transformed event equipment management from Outlook chaos to real-time clarity.
- [Kansas City Art Institute](https://www.shelf.nu/case-studies/kcai): Seamless migration from Cheqroom to Shelf.

## Free Tools

- [MACRS Depreciation Calculator](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/macrs-depreciation-calculator)
- [Equipment Depreciation Calculator](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/equipment-depreciation-calculator)
- [Salvage Value Calculator](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/salvage-value-calculator)
- [Asset ROI Calculator](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/asset-roi-calculator)
- [QR Code Generator](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/qr-code-generator)
- [QR Code Decoder](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/qr-code-decoder)
- [Asset Label Designer](https://www.shelf.nu/tools/asset-label-designer)

## About

Shelf is led by Carlos Virreira and Nikolay Bonev, supported by an open-source community. The platform is open-source with no vendor lock-in — you can verify the code, self-host, or use the managed cloud. Built with feedback from real users in education, logistics, media production, and technology.

- [About Page](https://www.shelf.nu/about)
- [Security](https://www.shelf.nu/security)
- [Terms](https://www.shelf.nu/terms)
- [Privacy](https://www.shelf.nu/privacy)
